title: Canadian Immigration for Healthcare Explained
content:
## Canadian Immigration for Healthcare Explained
Join McCarthy Tétrault’s MT>iplus Group as we discuss updates to immigration regulations for the Healthcare sector. Sarah Adler , Counsel, MT>iplus will discuss how immigration can alleviate the strain on the Healthcare system. Topics to be discussed include:
- Recent Immigration updates specifically pertaining to Medical Professionals
- Road Maps for approaching the Immigration process for Healthcare workers
- Effective uses of Temporary and Permanent Immigration Programs
For questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
Note : All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
Time: 12:00 p.m. – 1:00 p.m. (ET)
- Sarah Adler Counsel People.Offices.Singular Toronto
